title: remove_member_and_maybe_delete_group has redundant no-op DELETE
description: store.rs line 1010: after deleting the leaving member (line 999) and confirming remaining==0, a second DELETE FROM group_members WHERE group_id=?1 is executed. This is always a no-op when remaining==0 since the only member was just deleted. Extra DB round-trip per final group leave. Remove this redundant query.
